judge_result.short_rationale: The source requires washing with plenty of water, then sterile dressings if needed, and consulting a skin specialist for any confirmed exposure. The answer omits sterile dressings and weakens the required specialist consult to conditional medical attention only if irritation persists or large-area exposure. It also adds unsupported instructions (remove clothing, soap and water, neutralizing/ointment warning), so it is not safely source-faithful.
